code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut evens = ""
  mut odds = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if n % 2 == 0
      if string.is_empty(evens)
        evens = tok
      else
        evens = "#{evens} #{tok}"
      end
    else
      if string.is_empty(odds)
        odds = tok
      else
        odds = "#{odds} #{tok}"
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("evens=#{evens}")
  println("odds=#{odds}")
end
